lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Why hello there! I'm Kamfreena. Like the look of my pets? I think they're eyeing you up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That was a really bad pun.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Sorry... I don't get to see the rest of the guild much, stuck up here. The Cyclopes don't talk much you see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shouldn't that be cyclopses?

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Nope! Cyclopes is the plural of cyclops. One cyclops, many cyclopes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, right, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where are they from?

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: They're from the far east lands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did they get here?

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Ahh.. our guildmaster, Harrallak, went on an expedition there. He brought them back with him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are they here?

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: For the warriors to train on of course! They also drop a rather nice blade.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh? What would that be?

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Defenders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err what are they?

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: It's a blade you can defend with using your shield hand, like I have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: For every 10 tokens you collect around the guild, you can spend one minute in with my pets. As you get defenders you can show them to me to earn even better ones... but remember if you lose them you'll have

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: to start at bronze again. I'd advise keeping a spare in your bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Oh, by the way, you'll need to earn 100 tokens before I'll let you in!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I'd better go play some games then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: See you back here soon I hope!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Well, since you haven't shown me a defender to prove your prowess as a warrior,

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: I'll release some cyclopes which might drop bronze defenders for you to start off with, unless you show me another. Have fun in there.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the room while owning a defender

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Ahh I see that you have one of the defenders already! Well done.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: I'll release some cyclopes which might drop the next defender for you. Have fun in there.

sections.title: After running out of tokens in the room
If the player does not leave the room after 100 ticks

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Next time, please leave as soon as your time is up.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Your time is up, please make your way to the exit.

sections.title: Attempting to take off the Attack cape or max cape while in the room

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: You must keep your attack skillcape or max cape equipped to stay in the area.

sections.title: Entering the door after losing every defender

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: I remember you....

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: You don't have the defender you earned last time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... no, don't have it on me. I kind of... lost it.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Sorry, but as you've lost any that you earned before I can only let you in to kill the cyclopes that drop the bronze defenders. Go on in when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Bronze defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Bronze eh? The next cyclopes are ready, toddle in when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Iron defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Wow, iron eh? The next cyclopes are ready, toddle in when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Steel defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Strong as steel eh? The next cyclopes are ready, toddle in when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Black defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Black, hmmm, about half way to Rune then! Keep going! Cyclopes have been released. Enter when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Mithril defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Mithril? Getting good at this aren't you! Okay, I've released those cyclopes that sometimes drop adamant defenders. Enter when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have an Adamant defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: An adamant defender eh? Trying for the Rune defender I'm betting. Okay, I've released those cyclopes. Enter when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Rune defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Well done, you truly are a brilliant warrior! You should speak to my apprentice Lorelai in the basement for an additional challenge.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: If you'd rather stay up here, I've released the cyclopes. Enter when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Ahh I see that you've collected the highest defender I can offer you. Well done.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: There's an old friend of mine named Lorelai in the guild basement. You should go visit her and maybe she'll let you search for a dragon defender.

sections.title: When opening the door to the Cyclopes with a rune defender

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Ahh I see that you have one of the rune defenders already! Well done.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: You should speak to my apprentice Lorelai in the basement and test yourself against even stronger Cyclopes!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: The Cyclopes up here will continue to have a chance of dropping rune defenders. Have fun in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Dragon defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Well done! You can only get more Dragon defenders from the basement.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: If you'd rather stay up here, I've released the cyclopes that can drop rune defenders. Enter when you're ready.

sections.title: When opening the door to the Cyclopes with a dragon defender

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: I see you have one of the dragon defenders already! Well done, but you can only get more dragon defenders from the basement.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: If you'd rather stay up here, I've released the cyclopes that can drop rune defenders. Enter when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: You don't have space to carry them.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Of course! Here you go, you've earned [number] token[s]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: I'm afraid you have not earned any tokens yet. Try some of the activities around the guild to earn some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll go see what I can find.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Life isn't fair, that doesn't mean you can't win.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Be master[sic] of your mind rather than master by your mind.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: A reflection on a pool of water does not reveal its depth.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: When you aim for perfection, you discover it's a moving target.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: He who speaks in anger makes his anger heard, but his words forgotten.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Patience and persistence can bring down the tallest trees.

sections.title: Using any non-defender item on her

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: I don't need that.

lines.speaker: Kamfreena
lines.text: Here, have this.
